chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

text: 144- وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: إن المسلم إذا جاءه أخوه المسلم فقام معه في حاجته، كان كالمجاهد في سبيل الله

en.muhajir-b-ali: 144. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: A believer who rises to assist another believer when he comes to him for help is like one who strives in the way of Allah.
